creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: I have a separate set of changes for updating to 2.2 and was waiting for this change to get committed (it gets rid of post-install in favor using the upstream install-docs, installs the useful info doc, etc.).  I'd like to keep that as a separate issue.  I'll open a new bug for the 2.2 update if you want to bite that off now, but I'd prefer to commit the focused fix for this bug by itself.
